ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOGL) */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price at the start of the interval */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price at the end of the interval */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price during the interval */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price during the interval */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded during the interval */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for corporate actions */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate if the stock is traded in a different currency */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., API, manual input) */,
  "time_stamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_data_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the stock exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument (e.g., Stock, Bond, Option) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the financial instrument is denominated */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the financial instrument */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date for bonds and other fixed-income instruments */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* Strike price for options */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial market indicator (e.g., Moving Average, RSI) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "calculation_formula" TEXT /* Formula used to calculate the indicator */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of indicator (e.g., trend, momentum) */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period over which the indicator is calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis tool (e.g., Trend Analysis, Pattern Recognition) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tool */,
  "tool_version" TEXT /* Version of the analysis tool */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the tool was updated */,
  "supported_instruments" TEXT /* Types of financial instruments supported by the tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, financial analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the user is located */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price change, volume spike) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, dismissed) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Detailed message for the alert */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the alert should be checked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stock_data ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., trader, financial analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "default_access" TEXT /* Default access level for the role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the role was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the preference */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which alerts are received */,
  "data_range" TEXT /* Range of data to be retrieved (e.g., 1 day, 1 week) */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for notifications */,
  "preferred_currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency for displaying data */,
  "custom_settings" TEXT /* Custom settings for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_streams" (
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data stream */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument being streamed */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the data stream */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the data stream */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the streamed data */,
  "stream_status" TEXT /* Status of the data stream */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the stream was updated */,
  "stream_source" TEXT /* Source of the data stream */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_streams_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_streams_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the historical data */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the historical data */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the historical data file */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the historical data was updated */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Measure of the quality of the historical data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis tool used */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the prediction is made */,
  "prediction_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_data" TEXT /* Predicted data or outcome */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to generate the prediction */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the prediction was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES analysis_tools ("tool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stock_data ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stock_data ("stock_id")
)
